my-review.label: 自定义 · 只读审查
my-review.summary: 示例：只读代码并写审查意见，不改仓库
my-review.prompt:
Execution mode: MY-REVIEW (custom)
- Read-only: use read_file and glob only.
- Output findings as a structured review (severity, file, suggestion).
- Do not modify any files.
- End with a short todo_write checklist if fixes are needed later.

my-grill.label: 自定义 · 确认后执行
my-grill.summary: 示例：内置 skill + 确认门闩
my-grill.prompt:
Execution mode: MY-GRILL
- Follow builtin grill-me.
- Stay locked until the user confirms.
